title: Reconcile Phase 6A body-geometry-repair tests (CI-RED-015-I)
intent: Close the body-geometry-repair tail of CI-RED-015: correct 3 stale Phase 6A test fixtures and fix the arc-candidate detector so a clean curved chain produces a valid candidate. Phase 6A stays metrics-only: no DXF emission change, no Phase 6B output, no extraction-path change.

diff_articulation.what_changed: Commit 1 (test-only): test_fit_arc_noisy_points replaces a (5,5) translation (not noise) with deterministic radial jitter; test_enabled_with_contours expects phase 6A_analysis (not stale 6A_validation); test_straight_line_single_run raises dist_tol_mm so a continuous line stays one run. Commit 2 (production): detect_arc_candidates() now slides its own fixed-size window instead of segmenting via detect_contour_runs() (a straight-run detector that breaks curves on angle_tol_deg=12 and dist_tol_mm=0.75), leaving detect_contour_runs untouched.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: The arc fix is a category error fix, not a tolerance tweak: detect_contour_runs breaks an arc on the 12-degree angle deviation regardless of distance tolerance, so a clean 180-degree arc previously yielded zero candidates. Sliding an own window is the only change that makes detect_arc_candidates do what its docstring claims. The test edits are not cosmetic: they correct fixtures that contradicted the internally-consistent restored Phase 6A contract (translation-is-not-noise, 6A_analysis phase name, gap-tolerance vs sampling spacing).

commands_run: services/api .venv pytest tests/test_body_geometry_repair.py tests/test_body_solver_integration.py -> 49 passed (was 4 failed / 32 passed)
AC#7 both halves: test_detect_arc_in_curved_chain PASSED (arc detected+valid), test_no_arc_in_straight_chain PASSED (straight -> no valid arc)
sibling lock: test_distance_break PASSED (detect_contour_runs untouched, so the contract that locks the straight-line decision is preserved)
containment: repair_body_geometry has no app/ caller; arc candidates double-flagged default-off; metrics-only; cannot reach DXF

files.intent: Correct 3 stale Phase 6A fixtures (noisy-arc translation, phase name, straight-line tolerance)
detect_arc_candidates slides its own window; detect_contour_runs untouched
files.behavior_change: metrics_only - arc-candidate detection changes; double-flagged default-off; no app/ caller; zero DXF effect
